Appearances:
Plaintiff Jack Woo is present. .

Defendant Mark Miller is present.

The Judge Pro Tem Jean mileff, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. (501)
